summary: Research, verify, and synthesize a personalized chess-improvement curriculum for Scrodinger (FIDE ~1700)

phases.title: Research
phases.detail: parallel web research across 12 resource categories, personalized to profile

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: adversarially verify each resource exists, is current, and is well-regarded

phases.title: Synthesize
phases.detail: curate essential stack, map to phases, build weekly integration plan
